name: armature
description: Harness engineering framework for AI coding agents -- budget-controlled quality checks, architecture guardrails, and self-healing pipelines

tools.name: armature_check
tools.description: Run quality checks (lint, type, test) on a file

tools.name: armature_heal
tools.description: Auto-fix failures from a previous check

tools.name: armature_gc
tools.description: Run garbage collection on stale agent artifacts

tools.name: armature_budget
tools.description: Query remaining token budget for the current spec

tools.name: armature_estimate
tools.description: Estimate token cost for a set of files

tools.name: armature_baseline
tools.description: Capture or compare project quality baselines

tools.name: armature_calibrate
tools.description: Calibrate budget estimates from actual usage data
